title: dovyalis spinosissima
intro: Dovyalis spinosissima, also known as the thorny eling or wild apricot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Salicaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dovyalis spinosissima include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, as well as being used in traditional cooking and as a natural dye.
